explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle:
This starter app includes example
code to help you get started.

fileBasedRouting.title: File-based routing
fileBasedRouting.screensIntro: This app has two screens: {{screenOne}} and {{screenTwo}}
fileBasedRouting.layoutIntro: The layout file in {{layoutFile}} sets up the tab navigator.

platformSupport.title: Android, iOS, and web support
platformSupport.body: You can open this project on Android, iOS, and the web. To open the web version, press {{key}} in the terminal running this project.

images.title: Images
images.body: For static images, you can use the {{at2x}} and {{at3x}} suffixes to provide files for different screen densities.

themes.title: Light and dark mode components
themes.body: This template has light and dark mode support. The {{hookName}} hook lets you inspect the user's current color scheme so you can adjust UI colors accordingly.

animations.title: Animations
animations.body: This template includes an example of an animated component. The {{componentFile}} component uses {{libraryName}} to animate opening this hint.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Operational area to organize and review responsibilities.

house.title: House
house.subtitle: House coordination: incidents, calendar, members, and more.
